ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. Original certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. Single-page invoice issued by CellMark AB.

document_classification.document_pair_notes: Certificate file (Document A) contains both the certificate (page 1) and an embedded copy of the invoice (page 2). Per rule 8.5.0, the invoice for verification is taken from the separate invoice file (Document B). The embedded invoice in the certificate file is not used for verification. Both files contain the same invoice content (Invoice No. A10015572-01).

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-26D-429899 which does not contain any LC bankterm reference. No fields labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar are present.

search_results.location: Invoice file (Document B), page 1, footer/issuer block

search_results.context: CellMark logo in top right corner

search_results.location: Invoice file (Document B), page 1, description field
search_results.context: FSC MIX CREDIT. CELLMARK AB FSC CERTIFICATE NO DNV-COC-001902

search_results.location: Invoice file (Document B), page 1, certification statement
search_results.context: WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT... CellMark AB

consignor_search_step_2b.conclusion: CELLMARK AB is explicitly identified in the invoice file in multiple locations: issuer/footer block, header branding, description field, and certification statement.

pairing_validation_8_6.reasoning: Criterion 2 met: Certificate consignor 'CELLMARK AB' is identified as the invoice issuer (CELLMARK AB in footer and header). Criterion 3 met: Certificate consignee 'CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C.' matches invoice buyer 'CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C'. Certificate does not contain an explicit invoice number reference, so criterion 1 is not applicable. Pairing validated via criteria 2 and 3.

checkpoints.invoice_value: CELLMARK AB, Lilla Bommen 3C, BOX 11927, 404 39 GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.details: CELLMARK AB found explicitly in invoice footer/issuer block, header branding, description field, and certification statement. Direct match as invoice issuer.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - Consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Land verification via VAT prefix SE in SE556244243301 confirms Sweden
Land control - Certificate: SWEDEN, Invoice: SWEDEN (footer)

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignor 'CELLMARK AB' is explicitly identified as the invoice issuer in the invoice footer block ('CELLMARK AB, Lilla Bommen 3C, BOX 11927, 404 39 GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN'). Name matches exactly after normalization. Country SWEDEN matches explicitly in both documents. VAT number prefix SE further confirms Sweden. MATCH via rule 4.1.0.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'CELLMARK AB, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN'. Invoice text: 'CELLMARK AB, Lilla Bommen 3C, BOX 11927, 404 39 GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN' (footer). Exact name match. Country match. Rule 4.1.0 satisfied — no need to proceed to sequential 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6.

checkpoints.certificate_value: CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C., PO BOX 91635, ICAD III, ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates
checkpoints.invoice_value: CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C, ICAD III MUSSAFAH, ABU DHABI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has explicit 'Buyer' field with CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C
comparison_steps.details: Primary billing field 'Buyer' is present and contains a named commercial party.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C.' vs Invoice: 'CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C' — difference is only trailing period in L.L.C.
comparison_steps.details: After normalization of punctuation (periods in L.L.C. vs L.L.C), names are identical: 'crown paper mill llc'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'United Arab Emirates' vs Invoice: 'UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'

rules_applied.description: Priority order - Buyer field is primary billing field
Normalization of company designations (L.L.C. vs L.L.C)
Land control - United Arab Emirates matches
Address differences (PO BOX 91635 vs MUSSAFAH) do not affect MATCH per rule — only name and country matter

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignee 'CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C.' matches invoice buyer 'CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C' after normalization of punctuation (L.L.C. → LLC). Both are the same legal party name. Country 'United Arab Emirates' matches exactly. Address differences (PO BOX 91635 in certificate vs MUSSAFAH in invoice) do not affect the assessment per rule 4.2.4 — only company name and country are determinative.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate: 'CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C., PO BOX 91635, ICAD III, ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates'. Invoice Buyer field: 'CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C, ICAD III MUSSAFAH, ABU DHABI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'. After normalization: both → 'crown paper mill llc'. Country: 'united arab emirates' matches. Per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP, HS CODE: 47032900
checkpoints.invoice_value: SUZANO BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP. 100% PLANTED EUCALYPTUS. HS Code: 47032900

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers in certificate. HS code is present but is not an article number per se.
comparison_steps.details: No article numbers to verify via Priority 1. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify identity-bearing main designation in certificate
comparison_steps.details: Certificate main designation: 'BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP'. Invoice contains: 'SUZANO BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP'. The certificate's identity-bearing main designation is found as an exact substring in the invoice text after case normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains additional text 'SUZANO' (manufacturer prefix) and '100% PLANTED EUCALYPTUS' and 'FSC MIX CREDIT...'
comparison_steps.details: 'SUZANO' is a manufacturer/brand prefix that does not change product identity. '100% PLANTED EUCALYPTUS' and FSC certification are supplementary specifications. Per rule 4.3.4, these additions do not affect product identity since the main designation is exactly identifiable.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP' identified exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions (SUZANO prefix, 100% PLANTED EUCALYPTUS, FSC certification) do not alter product identity

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate's identity-bearing main designation 'BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP' is found exactly as a substring in the invoice's description 'SUZANO BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP'. The prefix 'SUZANO' is a manufacturer name that does not change product identity (rule 4.3.4). HS code 47032900 matches exactly in both documents. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 6: 'BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP, GROSS WEIGHT, HS CODE: 47032900'. Invoice description: 'SUZANO BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP. 100% PLANTED EUCALYPTUS. FSC MIX CREDIT. CELLMARK AB FSC CERTIFICATE NO DNV-COC-001902. HS Code: 47032900'. Main designation 'BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP' found exactly in invoice. HS code 47032900 matches. Rule 4.3.3 and 4.3.4 applied.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '5 500.000 MT'. This is the verification-grounding quantity.
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 value: 5500.000 MT with category GROSS WEIGHT (from box 6).

comparison_steps.description: Invoice totals row shows '5 500.000 GMT'. After thousands separator normalization: 5500.000. Certificate: 5500.000. Numerical values match exactly.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 5500.000 MT, Invoice: 5500.000 GMT. Numerical value 5500.000 is identical. MT vs GMT: GMT is 'Gross Metric Ton' which is equivalent to MT for gross weight. Certificate specifies 'GROSS WEIGHT' in box 6.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 6: 2750 UNITS / 22000 BALES. Invoice: 2750 UNITS, 22000 BALES.
comparison_steps.details: 2750 UNITS matches exactly. 22000 BALES matches exactly. No contradiction.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate uses space as thousands separator ('5 500.000', '2 750', '22 000'). Invoice also uses space ('5 500.000'). Normalization applied.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity (5 500.000 MT) is the verification-grounding quantity
Occurrence check - numerical value 5500.000 identified in invoice totals
Multiple quantities - at least one verified (weight). Additional quantities (UNITS, BALES) also verified without contradiction.
Total weight in invoice - 5500.000 GMT matches certificate 5500.000 MT gross weight

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate box 7 states 5 500.000 MT with GROSS WEIGHT indicated in box 6. Invoice totals show 5 500.000 GMT. Numerical value 5500.000 matches exactly after thousands separator normalization. GMT (Gross Metric Ton) corresponds to MT gross weight — per rule 4.4.4, difference in weight category naming does not cause MISMATCH when numerical value and unit match. Additionally, 2750 UNITS and 22000 BALES from certificate box 6 match invoice quantities exactly. No contradictions found. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: '5 500.000 MT'. Certificate box 6: 'GROSS WEIGHT', '2 750 UNITS / 22 000 BALES'. Invoice totals: '2750 UNITS, 5 426.544 ADMT, 22000 BALES, 5 500.000 GMT'. Box 7 value 5500.000 matches invoice 5500.000 (GMT). UNITS 2750=2750, BALES 22000=22000. The ADMT value (5426.544) is air-dry metric tons which is a different measurement — certificate does not claim this value so no contradiction. All certificate quantities verified.

checkpoints.invoice_value: THE GOODS ARE OF BRAZIL ORIGIN

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin statement in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains: 'WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF BRAZIL ORIGIN'. This is an explicit origin statement.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate origin 'BRAZIL' explicitly identified in invoice origin statement
comparison_steps.details: Single origin country, explicitly stated in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via explicit statement '...THE GOODS ARE OF BRAZIL ORIGIN'

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate box 3 states origin 'BRAZIL'. Invoice contains explicit origin certification: 'WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF BRAZIL ORIGIN'. Additionally, manufacturer is stated as 'SUZANO S.A., BRAZIL' in both documents. BRAZIL matches exactly. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'BRAZIL'. Invoice: 'WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF BRAZIL ORIGIN' and 'MANUFACTURER: SUZANO S.A., BRAZIL'. Exact text match for origin country. Rule 4.5.1, 4.5.5 satisfied.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate.
Certificate from Document A (page 1). Invoice from Document B (page 1). Document A page 2 contains embedded invoice copy — not used for verification per rule 8.5.0.
Consignor CELLMARK AB identified in invoice (criterion 2). Consignee CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C. identified in invoice buyer field (criterion 3).
CELLMARK AB found in invoice footer as issuer. Direct match.
Invoice has explicit Buyer field with CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C.
L.L.C. normalized to LLC. Names identical.
United Arab Emirates = UNITED ARAB EMIRATES after case normalization.
Address differences (PO BOX 91635 vs MUSSAFAH) do not affect result per rule 4.2.4.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.details: 'BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP' found exactly in invoice description.
SUZANO prefix and additional specifications do not affect product identity.
5 500.000 MT from box 7 used as primary verification quantity.
5500.000 found in invoice totals as 5 500.000 GMT.
Space used as thousands separator in both documents. Normalized for comparison.
5500.000 GMT in invoice corresponds to 5500.000 MT gross weight in certificate.
Explicit origin statement: 'THE GOODS ARE OF BRAZIL ORIGIN'.
BRAZIL explicitly identified in invoice origin statement.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: GMT in invoice could be a different unit than MT in certificate
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: GMT stands for 'Gross Metric Ton' which is the same unit as MT when the weight category is gross. Certificate explicitly states 'GROSS WEIGHT' in box 6 and '5 500.000 MT' in box 7. Invoice states '5 500.000 GMT' in totals. The numerical value is identical and GMT is the gross-weight equivalent of MT. Per rule 4.4.4, difference in naming convention for the same weight does not cause MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: ADMT value (5426.544) in invoice contradicts certificate weight
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: ADMT (Air-Dry Metric Ton) is a different measurement basis than gross weight MT. Certificate specifies GROSS WEIGHT, and 5500.000 MT gross is verified against 5500.000 GMT in invoice. The ADMT value is an additional measurement in the invoice that has no corresponding claim in the certificate. Per rule 4.4.3.1, additional quantities in the invoice that are not claimed by the certificate do not cause MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Address difference between certificate (PO BOX 91635, ICAD III) and invoice (ICAD III MUSSAFAH) for consignee could indicate different entities
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not in themselves cause MISMATCH. The company name and country are determinative. CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C. and United Arab Emirates match in both documents. PO BOX vs street address is a normal variation.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice in certificate file (page 2) should be used instead of separate invoice file
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 8.5.0, the invoice for verification must be taken from the separate invoice file (Document B), not from embedded copies in the certificate file. Both contain identical content (Invoice No. A10015572-01), so the result is the same, but the principle is that the separate file is the authoritative verification document.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Cellmark AB i Göteborg, Sverige bekräftas som fakturautställare. Mottagaren Crown Paper Mill L.L.C. i Abu Dhabi, Förenade Arabemiraten matchar fakturans köpare. Varubeskrivningen 'Bleached Eucalyptus Kraft Pulp' och kvantiteten 5 500 MT bruttovikt samt 2 750 enheter/22 000 balar återfinns i fakturan. Ursprungslandet Brasilien bekräftas uttryckligen i fakturans ursprungsintyg.
non_blocking_notes: Certificate file contains an embedded copy of the invoice on page 2. Verification performed against the separate invoice file per rule 8.5.0.
Invoice uses GMT (Gross Metric Ton) while certificate uses MT with GROSS WEIGHT designation — numerically identical.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: CELLMARK AB, Lilla Bommen 3C, BOX 11927, 404 39 GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN
sections.rule_applied: Consignor identified directly as invoice issuer in footer block. Land verified via explicit address and VAT prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare CELLMARK AB identifieras direkt som fakturautställare i fakturans footer-block. Företagsnamnet matchar exakt. Landet SWEDEN framgår explicit i fakturans adress och bekräftas av VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C., PO BOX 91635, ICAD III, ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates
sections.invoice_value: CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C, ICAD III MUSSAFAH, ABU DHABI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES (Buyer field)
sections.rule_applied: Consignee verified against invoice Buyer field (primary billing field). Name normalized (L.L.C. → LLC). Address differences disregarded per rule.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C. matchar fakturans köpare CROWN PAPER MILL L.L.C efter normalisering av punktnotation. Land United Arab Emirates matchar. Adressskillnader (PO BOX vs gatuadress) påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.certificate_value: BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP, HS CODE: 47032900
sections.invoice_value: SUZANO BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP. 100% PLANTED EUCALYPTUS. HS Code: 47032900
sections.rule_applied: Identity-bearing main designation matched exactly. Non-identity-bearing additions (manufacturer prefix, plantation info, FSC certification) disregarded.
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS KRAFT PULP' återfinns exakt i fakturans varubeskrivning. Prefixet 'SUZANO' är ett tillverkarnamn som inte ändrar produktidentitet. HS-kod 47032900 matchar exakt.

sections.rule_applied: Box 7 quantity (5500.000 MT gross weight) verified against invoice total (5500.000 GMT). Additional quantities (UNITS, BALES) also verified.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger 5 500.000 MT bruttovikt. Fakturans totalrad anger 5 500.000 GMT. Numeriska värdet 5500.000 matchar exakt. GMT (Gross Metric Ton) överensstämmer med MT bruttovikt. Dessutom matchar 2 750 UNITS och 22 000 BALES exakt mellan dokumenten.

sections.invoice_value: WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF BRAZIL ORIGIN
sections.rule_applied: Origin explicitly stated in invoice certification statement. Exact match.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland BRAZIL bekräftas uttryckligen i fakturans ursprungsintyg: 'THE GOODS ARE OF BRAZIL ORIGIN'. Exakt matchning.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatets uppgifter kan verifieras mot fakturan utan avvikelser. Dokumentparet kan rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 applicable checkpoints have status MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. No MISMATCH found. All checkpoint confidences ≥ 0.97, above 0.85 floor. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
